title: examples/batch-bench/ benchmark project
summary: Stand-alone non-game project at examples/batch-bench/. Boots camera + ambient + sun + ground; bootstrap seeds a default 20×20 grid (400) of Batchable cubes in 4 colours via attachUi → runtime.applyCommands. ?seed=N URL param overrides (clamped 1..4096); ?seed=0 keeps the empty baseline. Open the page and __agf.rendererInfo() reports drawCalls: 5, buckets: 4, bucketInstances: 400, handleLeak: 0 — a deterministic regression target when M17 internals change. Follow-up: labelled applyCommands scenarios (instance churn, transform updates per frame, varied-geometry / shared-material via M17-batched-mesh-system) writing JSON snapshots into test-results/.
notes: Auto-migrated from HIGH_LEVEL_BACKLOG.md → "Must-Have Engine Gaps (from `Notes/codex_review_1.md` M-section)" table on 2026-05-18.
